component.name: Nexterm
component.summary: GPU-accelerated terminal multiplexer with SSH, SFTP, and Lua scripting

description.p: Nexterm is a modern, GPU-accelerated terminal multiplexer built in Rust. It supports SSH connections, SFTP file transfers, Lua scripting for automation, and WASM plugins for extensibility.

ul.li: Lua scripting and status bar widgets
vt: fix u32 overflow panic in image.rs parse_decimal/parse_u32_bytes (DoS via crafted Sixel/Kitty escape)
vt: fix u32 add overflow panic in CSI CUF/CUD cursor movement (DoS via crafted CSI escape)
flatpak: enable Flatpak distribution channel (vendor cargo sources for offline sandbox build)
ci: stabilize Fuzz nightly with independent workspace declaration

description.p: v1.3.0: Sprint 5-6 refactor (state.rs / renderer / event_handler / input_handler split) + Sprint 5-7 UI/UX modernization (workspace, Quake mode, tab drag-and-drop reorder, background image, animations, command palette history).
v0.6.0 release: Kitty graphics protocol, ANSI 256-color, tiling layouts, floating panes, WASM plugins, and status bar widgets.
